description: Universal Search + Enhanced Command Palette + Notifications Center + Quick Actions - The micro-features that make the ecosystem feel premium and integrated. Enhances existing packages/components with real cross-app functionality.
steps: Step 1: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/UniversalSearch.tsx - Enhanced search component (triggered by Cmd+K or /) that searches across ALL apps using @quant/search CrossAppSearchService. Shows grouped results by app (emails, messages, files, docs, posts, people) with keyboard navigation, recent searches, and live suggestions. Dark mode, responsive (full-width on mobile). Uses framer-motion for open/close animation.

Step 2: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/NotificationPanel.tsx - Enhanced unified notification panel that extends the existing NotificationCenter with: real-time badge counts per app, notification grouping by app/type, mark-all-read, snooze button, filter by app, inline action buttons (reply, archive, dismiss). Uses framer-motion slide-in. Connects to @quant/notifications UniversalNotificationCenter.

Step 3: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/QuickActions.tsx - Context menu component for right-click/long-press on any item. Renders a floating menu with relevant actions based on item type (email: reply/forward/archive/label, file: download/share/move, message: reply/pin/delete, doc: edit/share/duplicate). Accessible via keyboard (Shift+F10). Uses portal rendering.

Step 4: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/UndoToast.tsx - Toast with undo action for destructive operations. Uses the ToastManager from shared-ui/src/advanced/toast-system.ts. Shows countdown timer (5s default), undo button, and auto-dismisses. Integrates with @quant/quant-tools UndoRegistry for actual undo capability.

Step 5: Create packages/shared-ui/src/components/Shell/OfflineIndicator.tsx - Offline/online status indicator component. Shows banner when offline, queues actions, displays sync status when back online. Uses navigator.onLine + online/offline events. Subtle animation on state change.

Step 6: Create packages/shared-ui/src/hooks/useKeyboardShortcuts.ts - React hook that wraps KeyboardShortcutManager from advanced/keyboard-shortcuts.ts. Registers Gmail-level shortcuts per app scope (g+i for inbox, g+d for drafts, c for compose, j/k for navigation, e for archive, etc). Returns help data for shortcut overlay.

Step 7: Create packages/shared-ui/src/hooks/useDragDrop.ts - React hook that wraps DragDropManager for file drop zones in chat, email, docs. Returns { dragState, dropRef, isDragOver } for easy integration. Validates file types/sizes using the existing validateFileDrop method.
Step 8: Create packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/universal-search.test.tsx - Test UniversalSearch: rendering, keyboard navigation, search results grouping, empty state.
Step 9: Create packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/notification-panel.test.tsx - Test NotificationPanel: rendering with notifications, mark-read, filtering, empty state.
Step 10: Create packages/shared-ui/src/__tests__/quick-actions.test.tsx - Test QuickActions: rendering, keyboard trigger, action execution.
Step 11: Update packages/shared-ui/src/index.ts to export all new components and hooks.
acceptance_criteria: UniversalSearch renders with Cmd+K trigger, shows grouped search results, keyboard navigation works
NotificationPanel shows notifications grouped by app with badge counts and action buttons
QuickActions renders context menu with correct actions per item type
UndoToast shows countdown and executes undo on click
OfflineIndicator shows/hides based on online status
useKeyboardShortcuts hook registers and unregisters shortcuts properly
useDragDrop hook provides drag state and drop zone ref
All new tests pass via vitest run
TypeScript strict mode compiles without errors
